source_jobs.title: Founding Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
Extend is building a modern document processing cloud. We're on a mission to transform how the world’s most exciting companies work with unstructured data.

We're looking for an exceptional Account Executive to join our founding team and drive enterprise revenue growth as we scale from 7-figures to 8-figures in ARR. The job is simple — convert curiosity into closed-won deals, and build long-term relationships that turn customers into advocates.


WHY YOU SHOULD CONSIDER JOINING

 - We've grown revenue 4x last year to several million ARR, with our growth continuing to accelerate

 - We have a product loved by users and being used in mission-critical flows at enterprises (Square, Zillow, Chime) and startups (Brex, Mercury, Checkr), and many more

 - The market for document processing has expanded 1000x due to LLMs, and all existing solutions are low NPS

 - We're punching well above our weight, supporting customer and revenue metrics with half the team size of other startups — everyone joining at this stage will have outsized impact

 - We've raised our series A, de-risked the business, and our sales team has exceeded quota every quarter, but there's still tremendous upside ahead; now's the perfect time to join.


ROLE & IMPACT

The role is to guide technical prospects through the rapidly evolving OCR/LLM ecosystem, and help them understand if Extend is a good fit for their needs. You'll serve as a trusted advisor for document processing solutions - from initial proof-of-concepts, to mission-critical production deployments.

 - You'll lead end to end sales cycles from education to implementation - all while navigating multiple teams (e.g. AI, Engineering, Product, Operations), use cases, and decision criteria

 - You'll conduct deep technical discovery to understand existing infrastructure, in order to present tradeoffs and prescribe solutions that balance performance, cost, and complexity

 - You’ll build champions and partner with them to design proof-of-concepts, demonstrate real-world impact, and secure executive buy-in for production rollout

 - You’ll shepherd prospects through extensive Legal, Security, & Procurement processes - managing sensitive topics from data retention, to deployment strategies, to enterprise pricing models

 - You’ll guide customers from signed contract to successful deployment - from regular office hours, to configuration recommendations, and workflow best practices, you will remain their go-to Extend advisor

 - You'll capture & analyze signal from the field, and collaborate with our founding team to continue refining GTM & product strategies


IDEAL CANDIDATE CREDENTIALS

 - You're naturally helpful and curious about how things work. You ask thoughtful questions and actually listen to the answers

 - You can communicate clearly & authentically across all levels of an organization, from engineers to executives

 - You have a consultative selling approach and genuinely care about solving customer problems, not just hitting quota

 - You're comfortable pushing beyond your zone of competence, and remain positive when things don't go according to plan

 - You have a founder mentality. No task is beneath you, and you thrive when the path isn't perfectly clear

 - Above all, you're hungry to win and humble in the pursuit


BENEFITS

Beyond the below, we care deeply about each of our candidates on a personal level. We take the time to understand your needs to craft a package designed for you:

 - Insurance - 90% health insurance premium coverage

 - Relocation - for candidates based outside of NYC

 - Unlimited PTO policy - we trust everyone like owners, take what you need

 - Daily lunch & snacks covered (plus dinner if you're in the office late) - you'll never go hungry and you help pick the snacks

 - Unlimited token / tooling access - no handicaps on your productivity

 - Learning and development investment - we invest heavily in our team and support your growth



Extend is an Equal Opportunity Empl

source_jobs.title: GTM
source_jobs.description:
Extend is building the most accurate document ingestion infrastructure to change how the world's most exciting companies work with unstructured data (e.g. PDFs, Excel, images, etc.). From payment processing to home closings to cancer research and more, AI teams at companies like Square, Zillow, Brex, Flatiron Health, Checkr, and Mercury use Extend to process their most complex documents.

We're looking for someone to join our growth team. We have ambitious goals, a process that works, and a GTM organization across sales, marketing, and customer success that's built to support growth. Now we're looking to scale it even further.




WHY YOU SHOULD CONSIDER JOINING

 - We've grown revenue 15x this year to several million ARR, with our growth continuing to accelerate

 - We have a product loved by 250+ customers from the latest YC batches to some of Americaʼs oldest companies

 - The market for document processing has expanded 1000x due to LLMs, and existing solutions are all low NPS

 - We're punching well above our weight, supporting customer and revenue metrics with half the team size of other startups. Everyone joining at this stage will have outsized impact

 - We have a very talent dense team (e.g. former founders, world record holders) operating in a high performance culture, in-person in NYC, with high equity ownership

 - We're tackling novel, unsolved problems at the intersection of LLMs, complex data processing, and human ↔ AI interfaces

 - We're backed by world class investors, including Y Combinator, Innovation Endeavors, Homebrew, and more
   
   


ROLE & IMPACT

Over the next 12 months, more documents will be ingested and processed than all of human history combined. Document processing is blowing up, and everyone is talking about it. We even closed six figures in ARR from a tweet that reached 500k impressions.

You'll be the architect of our rocket ship. No growth channel is off limits, and no idea is too wild.

 - Launch creative campaigns that break through the noise: from outbound messages, viral social posts, co-sponsored events & executive dinners, to billboards & subway ads, you will have the budget to bring ideas to life

 - Target and nurture ideal prospect over their entire technical evaluation lifecycle 6 months+)

 - Leverage partner relationships in the start-up space + customers that rave about us

 - Design scalable foundations using cutting-edge tools for analytics, automation, and optimization

 - Work directly with our founding team to define a market category and own the airwaves
   
   


IDEAL CANDIDATE CREDENTIALS

 - You've been at high-growth startups and know what "great" looks like. You've operated at a similar stage �$1�20M ARR) before, and have grown a technical product to millions of users

 - You have an affinity for using technical tools (ie Claude Code) in addition to the traditional GTM stack

 - You own your work. Founder mentality and no task is beneath you


BENEFITS

Beyond the below, we care deeply about each of our candidates on a personal level. We take the time to understand your needs to craft a package designed for you:

 - Insurance - 90% health insurance premium coverage

 - Relocation - for candidates based outside of NYC

 - Unlimited PTO policy - we trust everyone like owners, take what you need

 - Daily lunch & snacks covered (plus dinner if you're in the office late) - you'll never go hungry and you help pick the snacks

 - Unlimited token / tooling access - no handicaps on your productivity

 - Learning and development investment - we invest heavily in our team and support your growth



Extend is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We consider all qualified applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, national origin, age, disability, genetic information, citizenship status, marital status, pregnancy, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable federal, sta

source_jobs.title: Growth Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Extend is building a modern document processing platform. We're on a mission to transform how the world works with unstructured data.

We’re hiring a Growth Engineer to join our founding team and own technical distribution. This role sits at the intersection of engineering, product, and GTM, and is focused on shipping real technical artifacts that earn developer attention and drive adoption.

This is a hands-on engineering role. You will be writing code.




WHY YOU SHOULD CONSIDER JOINING

 - We grew revenue 400% last year, with growth continuing to accelerate

 - Extend is used in mission-critical workflows at companies like Chime, Flatiron Health, Brex, Opendoor, Checkr, and more

 - The document processing market has expanded 1000× due to LLMs — and existing solutions are brittle and low-trust

 - We punch far above our weight with a lean team — every hire has outsized leverage

 - We’re solving novel problems at the intersection of LLMs, evals, complex data pipelines, and human-in-the-loop systems

 - Backed by world-class investors (YC, Homebrew, investors from OpenAI, and more)

 - You’ll work directly with the CEO, CTO, and founding team with real ownership


IMPACT

Document processing is exploding. Developers are actively evaluating tools and asking: what actually works?

Your job is to answer that question publicly and credibly.

This role exists to:

 - Own technical distribution for Extend

 - Build artifacts developers trust because they can inspect and test them

 - Shape how the market understands document processing, OCR, and extraction

Success looks like shipping projects that drive real usage, pipeline, and category leadership — not vanity metrics.




ROLE

You will build and ship technical growth experiments end-to-end.

Responsibilities include:

 - Build public-facing technical projects (e.g. OCR Arena (ocrarena.ai), benchmarks, demos, microsites)

 - Design and run benchmarks for document processing (accuracy, latency, cost, tradeoffs)

 - Ship technical demos, reference implementations, and eval harnesses

 - Write production-quality code across the stack

 - Own projects from idea → build → launch → iteration

 - Instrument experiments and tie them back to adoption and revenue impact

 - Partner closely with Engineering, Product, and GTM

 - Move fast, test aggressively, and kill ideas that don’t work


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

You likely have:

 - Strong engineering fundamentals and experience shipping real systems

 - Comfort working across the stack (frontend, backend, infra, data)

 - Experience with APIs, datasets, evals, or developer tooling

 - Background in high-growth startups or highly ambiguous environments

 - Ability to communicate clearly with a technical audience

You might have:

 - Built tools, benchmarks, or demos that became externally useful

 - Written technical content grounded in systems you actually built

 - Shipped side projects that attracted real developer usage or attention

 - Worked at the intersection of product, engineering, and growth

You definitely have:

 - High agency and velocity

 - Strong technical taste (signal > noise)

 - A founder mentality — no task is beneath you

 - Obsession with outcomes, not activity
   
   


BENEFITS

Beyond the below, we care deeply about each of our candidates on a personal level. We take the time to understand your needs to craft a package designed for you:

 - Insurance - 90% health insurance premium coverage

 - Relocation - for candidates based outside of NYC

 - Unlimited PTO policy - we trust everyone like owners, take what you need

 - Daily lunch & snacks covered (plus dinner if you're in the office late) - you'll never go hungry and you help pick the snacks

 - Unlimited token / tooling access - no handicaps on your productivity

 - Learning and development investment - we invest heavily in our team and support your growth



Extend is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We consider all qualified applicants for employment with

source_jobs.title: Applied AI/ML Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Extend is building a modern document processing platform, reimagined with LLMs. We're on a mission to transform how the world works with unstructured data.

As an AI Engineer at Extend, you’ll be responsible for building state-of-the-art document processing infrastructure and applied AI product features. The work you do will impact every single customer across the millions of documents that our system ingests and processes every month.

We’re looking to hire engineers who think creatively about problems, keep up to date on the latest in AI research, push for real-world customer impact (not only theory), and are excited about helping businesses tackle one of their most painful problems with AI.




WHY YOU SHOULD CONSIDER JOINING

 - We've grown revenue 4x last year to several million ARR, with our growth continuing to accelerate

 - We have a product loved by users and being used in mission-critical flows at enterprises (Square, Zillow, Chime) and startups (Brex, Mercury, Checkr), and many more

 - The market for document processing has expanded 1000x due to LLMs, and all existing solutions are low NPS

 - We're punching well above our weight, supporting customer and revenue metrics with half the team size of other startups — everyone joining at this stage will have outsized impact

 - We've raised our series A & de-risked the business, but there's tremendous upside ahead; now's the perfect time to join.

 - You'll be joining a talent dense team (e.g. former founders, world record holders) operating in a high performance culture, in-person in NYC, with high equity ownership

 - We're tackling novel, unsolved problems at the intersection of LLMs, complex data processing, and human ↔ AI interfaces

 - You'll get a front row seat to how a successful startup is built with plenty of leadership opportunities as we grow quickly

We're a lean team, and our customer base is growing too fast for us to keep up. We're looking for talented engineers to join our team and execute on an ambitious roadmap.




IMPACT

We're powering mission-critical data processing at companies where if we get things wrong, there are real world impacts (e.g. missed payments, people can't move into homes on time).

Here's a few of the complex problems you’ll be working on:

 - Building a QA Agent to flag low confidence results

 - Deploy an optimizer agent in a loop that improves document performance in the background

 - Creating multimodal models for document layout awareness

 - Novel chunking strategies for handling long documents

 - Building data pipelines and evaluating model performance

 - Building a self-correcting system that automatically gets better over time


ROLE

 - Design novel LLM techniques for increasing the complexity of use cases and data streams that Extend can be applied to

 - Monitor existing models in production, understand what’s working well (and what isn’t), and run experiments to solve those issues

 - Have complete ownership over the work you do — as a founding team member, you’ll have the opportunity to truly own large areas of product and engineering and have direct relationship with customers.

 - Work directly with the CEO, CTO, and other founding members and help build out our team.
   


BENEFITS

Beyond the below, we care deeply about each of our candidates on a personal level. We take the time to understand your needs to craft a package designed for you:

 - Insurance - 90% health insurance premium coverage

 - Relocation - for candidates based outside of NYC

 - Unlimited PTO policy - we trust everyone like owners, take what you need

 - Daily lunch & snacks covered (plus dinner if you're in the office late) - you'll never go hungry and you help pick the snacks

 - Unlimited token / tooling access - no handicaps on your productivity

 - Learning and development investment - we invest heavily in our team and support your growth
   
   

Extend is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We consider all qualified applicants for emp

source_jobs.title: Solutions Engineer
source_jobs.description:
SOLUTIONS ENGINEER

Extend is building a modern document processing cloud. We're on a mission to transform how the world works with unstructured data.

As a Solutions Engineer at Extend, you'll act as the primary technical interface for customers evaluating Extend and own pre-sales deals end-to-end. We're looking to hire engineers who obsess over customer pain, relentlessly focus on the details, operate with high agency, and love chasing deals.




WHY YOU SHOULD CONSIDER JOINING

 - We've grown revenue 400% last year to several million ARR, with our growth continuing to accelerate

 - We have a product loved by users and being used in mission-critical flows at enterprises (Square, Zillow, Chime) and startups (Brex, Mercury, Checkr), and many more

 - The market for document processing has expanded 1000x due to LLMs, and all existing solutions are low NPS

 - We're punching well above our weight, supporting customer and revenue metrics with half the team size of other startups — everyone joining at this stage will have outsized impact

 - We've raised our series A & de-risked the business, but there's tremendous upside ahead; now's the perfect time to join

 - You'll be joining a talent dense team (e.g. former founders, world record holders) operating in a high performance culture, in-person in NYC, with high equity ownership

 - We're tackling novel, unsolved problems at the intersection of LLMs, complex data processing, and human ↔ AI interfaces

 - You'll get a front row seat to how a successful startup is built with plenty of leadership opportunities as we grow quickly


ROLE

 - Own customer relationships, with a focus on pre-sales deal cycles

 - Design and architect solutions to solve complex customer problems using Extend as the primary tool

 - Give compelling product demos that translate complex technical concepts into easy-to-understand value propositions

 - Run and manage POCs from planning through execution, ensuring prospects hit their success criteria

 - Inspire confidence with technical champions by answering deep technical questions (API architecture, security, parsing mechanisms, on-prem deployments)

 - Diagnose and resolve technical issues quickly when customers encounter problems with schemas, prompts, and processor configurations

 - Partner closely with Account Executives to flip technical champions and progress deals


IMPACT

Ensuring our customers can successfully deploy LLMs into production is critical, and comes with never before seen challenges. We need to make sure we're world class at this.

Here's a few of the complex problems you'll be working on:

 - How do we enable enterprises to gain confidence in deploying AI?

 - How do we architect the ideal evaluation experience for customers?

 - How do we enable customers to become experts at using our product?

 - How do we help customers understand tradeoffs between latency, cost, and performance, and make the best decision for their use case?


WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR


REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

 - 3+ years of experience in a Sales Engineering or Solutions Engineering role, with at least 1+ years, and a strong track record, of leading pre-sales deals

 - Proven track record selling technical products to developers and technical decision makers

 - Strong technical foundation with the ability to discuss architecture, APIs, and integration patterns fluently


KEY ATTRIBUTES

 - Learns extremely fast — You'll need to ramp up quickly on our product and stay current with rapid changes

 - Exceptional interpersonal skills — You give energy rather than take it away and leave people feeling better than before

 - Strong listening skills and curiosity — You deeply understand customer problems before prescribing solutions

 - Resilience and problem-solving mindset — When prospects bring up issues, your response is "No problem, here's how we can help"

 - Intellectual honesty — You never bullshit. When you don't know something, you admit it and follow up quic

source_jobs.title: Staff Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Extend https://extend.app is building a modern document processing cloud. We're on a mission to transform how the world works with unstructured data.

As a Software Engineer at Extend, you’ll be responsible for building our core platform that companies use to deploy document processing. We’re looking to hire exceptional engineers who care about crafting intuitive product experiences, relentlessly focus on the details, and operate with high agency.




WHY YOU SHOULD CONSIDER JOINING

 - We've grown revenue 4x last year to several million ARR, with our growth continuing to accelerate

 - We have a product loved by users and being used in mission-critical flows at enterprises (Square, Zillow, Chime) and startups (Brex, Mercury, Checkr), and many more

 - The market for document processing has expanded 1000x due to LLMs, and all existing solutions are low NPS

 - We're punching well above our weight, supporting customer and revenue metrics with half the team size of other startups — everyone joining at this stage will have outsized impact

 - We've raised our series A & de-risked the business, but there's tremendous upside ahead; now's the perfect time to join.

 - You'll be joining a talent dense team (e.g. former founders, world record holders) operating in a high performance culture, in-person in NYC, with high equity ownership

 - We're tackling novel, unsolved problems at the intersection of LLMs, complex data processing, and human ↔ AI interfaces

 - You'll get a front row seat to how a successful startup is built with plenty of leadership opportunities as we grow quickly

We're a lean team, and our customer base is growing too fast for us to keep up. We're looking for talented engineers to join our team and execute on an ambitious roadmap.




IMPACT

We're powering mission-critical data processing at companies where if we get things wrong, there are real world impacts (e.g. missed payments, people can't move into homes on time).

Here's a few of the complex technical problems we're working on:

 - How do we build the most accurate document ingestion system?

 - How do we enable enterprises to deploy LLM-powered document processing into production with confidence?

 - How do we handle never before seen edge cases in customer data?

 - How do we build a self-correcting system that automatically gets better over time?

 - How do we enable non-technical domain experts to improve models with their expertise & business logic?

 - How do we help customers make tradeoffs between latency, cost, and performance?

 - How do we build reliable systems that can process large data streams in real-time?




ROLE

 - Build, and maintain, durable, scalable systems capable of processing 10s of millions of data points per month.

 - Design and implement the best human ↔ AI interfaces for designing and understanding document processing. We are building a new territory of UX that previously did not exist. It’s up to us to discover and implement new patterns that work for our users.

 - Have complete ownership over the work you do — as a founding team member, you’ll have the opportunity to truly own large areas of product and engineering and have direct relationship with customers.

 - Work directly with the CEO, CTO, and other founding members and help build out our team.




IDEAL CANDIDATE CREDENTIALS

 - 7+ years of experience building complex software systems in production environments

 - You've been at high-growth startups and know what "great" looks like

 - Ability to take abstract projects end-to-end, operating with high agency

 - Experience deploying AI/ML systems into production environments

 - Experience with developer tools is a plus




BENEFITS

Beyond the below, we care deeply about each of our candidates on a personal level. We take the time to understand your needs to craft a package designed for you:

 - Insurance - 90% health insurance premium coverage

 - Relocation - for candidates based outside of NYC

 - Unlimited PTO

source_jobs.title: Growth & Community
source_jobs.description:
Extend is building the unified end-to-end document processing platform for developers shipping AI applications. We're on a mission to transform how the world works with unstructured data.



As the Growth & Community lead, your goal is to help more developers hear about and interact with Extend where they naturally congregate online. You'll own how we show up across X, LinkedIn, and anywhere else our users like to hang out, run our company channels end-to-end, own the strategy and cadence behind activating our executive team, conduct social listening, and build out our community of evangelists.



We are lucky to have built a base of power users, engaged partners, and strong relationships within the startup ecosystem. You will own the critical task of building and activating our broader community while exploring opportunities for collaboration with users, customers, and creators.



If you understand the power of social as a distribution engine, are fluent in X culture, have a sense of humor and equally strong opinions on what good developer community building looks like, then this role is for you.




WHY YOU SHOULD CONSIDER JOINING

 - We've grown revenue 4x last year to several million ARR, with growth continuing to accelerate

 - We have a product loved by users and being used in mission-critical flows at enterprises (Square, Zillow, Chime) and startups (Brex, Mercury, Checkr), and many more

 - The market for document processing has expanded 1000x due to LLMs, and all existing solutions are low NPS

 - We're punching well above our weight, supporting customer and revenue metrics with half the team size of other startups — everyone joining at this stage will have outsized impact

 - We've raised our series A & de-risked the business, but there's tremendous upside ahead; now's the perfect time to join.

 - You'll be joining a talent dense team operating in a high performance culture, in-person in NYC, with high equity ownership

 - You'll get a front row seat to how a successful startup is built with plenty of leadership opportunities as we grow this rocket ship




IMPACT & ROLE

Distribution is one of the highest-leverage opportunities we have. Our product wins bake-offs, but the category is loud and the companies that consistently capture developer mindshare on social will be the ones pulling away. You'll be the person who makes sure Extend is at the forefront, and over time, you'll shape how we think about content strategy and community as a whole.



You'll have complete ownership over the work you do. As an early team member, you'll truly own a large surface area and work directly with the CEO and other founding members in a high trust, high autonomy environment.



Here's a few of the things you'll be working on:

 - Own Extend's company social presence on X and LinkedIn end-to-end. From strategy, cadence, voice, content, social listening, engagement, and reporting

 - Building a content distribution engine that compounds. Every blog post, customer story, launch, and technical write-up gets the distribution it deserves across both company and executive accounts optimized for its distribution channel

 - Own the process, strategy, and cadence of our executive content program. Build the engine that turns their meetings, learnings, and opinions into posts, and ship at a high cadence. Make our team fun, authentic, and trusted voices in the B2B AI and document processing conversation

 - Designing and running social-first campaigns around launches, customer wins, and product moments in tight coordination with marketing, product, and engineering

 - Establishing the metrics that matter (followers, qualified engagement, inbound, pipeline-influenced) and building a feedback loop so we double down on what compounds

 - Building community across channels and forums, online and IRL

 - Experimenting across formats (long-form threads, memes, video, carousels, Thought Leader Ads, podcast clips) and treating the work like a portfo

source_jobs.title: Machine Learning Researcher
source_jobs.description:
Extend is building a modern document processing cloud. We're on a mission to transform how the world works with unstructured data.

As a Machine Learning Engineer at Extend, you’ll be responsible for building state-of-the-art document processing infrastructure. The work you do will impact every single customer across the millions of documents that our system ingests and processes every month.

We’re looking to hire engineers who think creatively about problems, keep up to date on the latest in AI research, push for real-world customer impact (not only theory), and are excited about helping businesses tackle one of their most painful problems with AI.




WHY YOU SHOULD CONSIDER JOINING

 - We've grown revenue 400% last year to several million ARR, with our growth continuing to accelerate

 - We have a product loved by users and being used in mission-critical flows at enterprises (Square, Zillow, Chime) and startups (Brex, Mercury, Checkr), and many more

 - The market for document processing has expanded 1000x due to LLMs, and all existing solutions are low NPS

 - We're punching well above our weight, supporting customer and revenue metrics with half the team size of other startups — everyone joining at this stage will have outsized impact

 - We've raised our series A & de-risked the business, but there's tremendous upside ahead; now's the perfect time to join.

 - You'll be joining a talent dense team (e.g. former founders, world record holders) operating in a high performance culture, in-person in NYC, with high equity ownership

 - We're tackling novel, unsolved problems at the intersection of LLMs, complex data processing, and human ↔ AI interfaces

 - You'll get a front row seat to how a successful startup is built with plenty of leadership opportunities as we grow quickly

We're a lean team, and our customer base is growing too fast for us to keep up. We're looking for talented engineers to join our team and execute on an ambitious roadmap.





ROLE

 - Training and deploying SOTA vision models for document processing

 - Design novel LLM techniques for increasing the complexity of use cases and data streams that Extend can be applied to

 - Monitor existing models in production, understand what’s working well (and what isn’t), and run experiments to solve those issues

 - Have complete ownership over the work you do — as a founding team member, you’ll have the opportunity to truly own large areas of product and engineering and have direct relationship with customers.

 - Work directly with the CEO, CTO, and other founding members and help build out our team.




BENEFITS

Beyond the below, we care deeply about each of our candidates on a personal level. We take the time to understand your needs to craft a package designed for you:

 - Insurance - 90% health insurance premium coverage

 - Relocation - for candidates based outside of NYC

 - Unlimited PTO policy - we trust everyone like owners, take what you need

 - Daily lunch & snacks covered (plus dinner if you're in the office late) - you'll never go hungry and you help pick the snacks

 - Unlimited token / tooling access - no handicaps on your productivity

 - Learning and development investment - we invest heavily in our team and support your growth



Extend is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We consider all qualified applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, national origin, age, disability, genetic information, citizenship status, marital status, pregnancy, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable federal, state, or local law.

notes: High-growth startup with strong engineering focus, but some GTM roles
